hero.badge: 7-day free trial · No commitment · No credit card
hero.title: Your store deserves better
hero.subtitle: NeoFlow BOS brings together invoicing, inventory, GPS deliveries, after-sales and agentic AI into a single workspace. Built for furniture and bedding store owners who want their time back.

pain.title: You're losing time. Every single day.
pain.subtitle: Not because you work poorly — but because your tools haven't changed in 10 years.

items.title: Software frozen in 2010
items.desc: The legacy tools in this industry were designed before smartphones. No AI, no automation, no evolution. You're paying for technical debt — and losing hours every week because of it.

items.title: Everything is manual, nothing connects
items.desc: POS on one side, stock spreadsheet on another, delivery app somewhere else. You re-enter the same data three times. That time could go to your customers and your growth.

items.title: Your competitors are adopting AI — you're not
items.desc: Automation and AI are no longer for large corporations. Those who make the shift now gain better margins, better organisation, and a real competitive edge.

solution.title: One tool.
solution.desc: NeoFlow BOS replaces the 5 separate tools you're using today: quotes, orders, invoices, inventory, GPS deliveries, after-sales with credit notes — and an AI that knows your business in real time.

steps.title: Create your workspace in 2 minutes
steps.desc: No installation, no server setup. Your NeoFlow BOS workspace is ready as soon as you sign up — from any browser, on any device.

steps.title: Configure it to your store
steps.desc: Add your products, set up your stock locations, invite your team with the right role. NeoFlow BOS adapts to your structure — not the other way around.

steps.title: Sell, quote, invoice
steps.desc: Create a quote in 30 seconds, convert it to an order in one click, issue the invoice automatically. PDF generated, email sent, payment tracked.

steps.title: Manage deliveries with GPS
steps.desc: Assign deliveries from the kanban board. Your drivers have a dedicated mobile app with GPS navigation — completely isolated from your back office.

steps.title: Let AI work for you
steps.desc: NeoChat queries your live data, generates documents and can act on your account — always with your confirmation. This is not a chatbot. It's an agent.

items.title: NeoChat — AI that acts
items.desc: Ask about overdue orders, request a delivery, get a monthly analysis. It executes — with your approval. Not a chatbot: an agent that knows your business.

items.title: Quote → Order → Invoice
items.desc: Your commercial pipeline as one continuous flow. Convert a quote to an order in one click. The invoice follows automatically. PDF, email and payment tracking included.

items.title: Stock by location
items.desc: Track stock levels per physical location: showroom, warehouse, depot. Configurable threshold alerts. Every movement is logged.

items.title: Deliveries & GPS driver app
items.desc: Organise deliveries in a kanban, set customer time slots. Your drivers have a dedicated GPS app — with no access to your back office.

items.title: After-sales & one-click credits
items.desc: Every after-sales ticket is linked to a specific order and item. Full intervention history. Generate a credit note directly from the ticket — no re-entry.

items.title: Team & isolated roles
items.desc: Four roles: Owner, Manager, Salesperson, Driver. Each person sees only what they need. Invitations via secure link, revocable at any time.

neochat.title: The AI that
neochat.desc: NeoChat is not a generic chatbot. It knows your inventory, your orders, your customers. It can search, analyse, and create — and always asks for your confirmation before writing anything to your account.

demo.text: Which orders have been pending for more than 3 days?
3 blocked orders: ORD-0287 (Mr. Smith, £1,890), ORD-0283 (Renov Ltd, £8,750), ORD-0279 (Mrs. Martin, £3,240). Shall I schedule the deliveries?

plans.name: Basic
plans.desc: To take back control of your daily store management.

plans.name: Pro
plans.desc: For teams ready to automate and scale.

plans.name: Enterprise
plans.desc: For retail networks and multi-store groups.

items.a: NeoFlow BOS is designed for owners and managers of furniture and bedding stores — independent or part of a network. If you manage quotes, orders, deliveries and after-sales, NeoFlow BOS was built for you.

items.q: Do I need to reinstall anything or migrate data?
items.a: No installation required. NeoFlow BOS runs entirely in your browser. Your workspace is ready in 2 minutes. Data migration from existing tools can be discussed based on your situation.
None whatsoever. Cancel at any time from your account. The annual plan gives you 2 months free vs monthly, but remains cancellable with no fees.

items.q: Can NeoChat actually modify my data?
items.a: Yes — that's what sets it apart from a chatbot. NeoChat can create deliveries and update order statuses. But it always asks for your approval before acting. You stay in control.

items.q: How does the free trial work?
items.a: 7 days of full access to the plan of your choice, with no credit card required. The trial starts when you create your account. After 7 days, you decide whether to continue.

items.q: Can my team use NeoFlow BOS?
items.a: Yes. You invite team members with a specific role: Manager, Salesperson or Driver. Each person only sees what they need. Drivers even have their own dedicated mobile app.
Yes, with the Enterprise plan. Each store has its own isolated workspace. A consolidated group dashboard is currently being rolled out to provide a unified multi-site view.

items.q: How do I reach support if I have an issue?
items.a: Email support for all plans. Pro customers get priority support. Enterprise customers have a dedicated contact with a guaranteed SLA.

finalCta.title: Stop working around
finalCta.desc: 7 days to test NeoFlow BOS on your real activity. No credit card. No commitment. If it's not right for you, cancel in one click.
finalCta.mention: No credit card required · Cancel anytime

footer.tagline: The Business Operating System for furniture and bedding stores.

contact.title: Get in
contact.desc: A question before you sign up, a technical issue or a specific request? Our team replies within 24 hours.

enterprise.title: NeoFlow BOS for
enterprise.desc: A centralised space to run multiple stores without losing granularity. Each location keeps its autonomy — you keep the full picture.

features.title: One isolated workspace per store
features.desc: Data, team and stock separated by location. No information leak between your stores. Each manager handles their own scope.

features.title: Consolidated multi-store view
features.desc: Revenue, orders and stock alerts from all your stores in one central dashboard. (Rolling out soon)

features.title: Unlimited members
features.desc: Invite as many collaborators as needed on each workspace, with the right role. No per-seat surcharge.

features.title: Unlimited NeoChat AI
features.desc: Unlimited tokens across all your workspaces. Agentic AI available for your entire team, no counter.

features.title: Dedicated contact & guaranteed SLA
features.desc: A direct line to NeoFlow. Guaranteed response time, priority availability 7 days a week. No anonymous ticket queue.

features.title: Onboarding & training included
features.desc: We configure NeoFlow BOS with you and train your teams. Your rollout is supported from day one to go-live.
